audienceSettings.desc: Manage who can see your posts with custom lists and best friends
audienceSettings.desc2: Create a special list of your most trusted contacts for exclusive content sharing
audienceSettings.desc3: Share with all your 1st-degree connections in The Quantum Club
audienceSettings.desc4: Choose your default audience for new posts to save time
audienceSettings.desc5: Every time you create a post, you'll see an audience picker button to select who can see it
audienceSettings.desc6: Your employer and current company are automatically protected unless you explicitly allow it
audienceSettings.desc7: See who viewed your posts and get insights on engagement from each audience segment

scheduling.desc: Share your availability and let people book time with you
scheduling.desc2: Create a Round Robin or Collective booking link to enable team load balancing features.
scheduling.text28: Let the person booking decide what their guests can do
scheduling.text30: Guests must pay before confirming their booking
